case_title: EVT, INC. DBA EVOLUTION 2000 VS. ROLO SAN FRANCISCO, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVT, INC. DBA EVOLUTION 2000

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVT, INC. DBA EVOLUTION 2000 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROLO SAN FRANCISCO, INC. $3,688.65 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $170.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,518.95, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $170.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ROLO SAN FRANCISCO, INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVT, INC. DBA EVOLUTION 2000 SERVED JAN-13-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROLO SAN FRANCISCO, INC.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF JUN-09-2004, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT ONLY AND ONLY UPON THE ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-50, INCLUSIVE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-09-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE APR-30-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
